Package com.qubitpi.aristotle.web

Class TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor

  • java.lang.Object
    • graphql.language.NodeVisitorStub
      • com.qubitpi.aristotle.web.TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    graphql.language.NodeVisitor
    @NotThreadSafe
public class TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor
extends graphql.language.NodeVisitorStub
    TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor is a visitor that, by the end of its visit of a Document, returns the first selection field argument value whose key is "id".

    For example, when a Document below is visited 

     
 query {
     getTask(id: "0x3") {
         id
         title
         completed
     }
     getAssignee(id: "EWGETBSDF") {
         name
         title
         department
     }
 }
    The "0x3" would be picked up and will be available as the return value of getArgumentValue()

    Note that there are constraints where TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor can be applied:

    • The argument must exist in the first definition in the definition sequence of the Document query and the first definition must be an OperationDefinition. For example, in the query above, getTask and getAssignee together compose the "first" and it is itself a OperationDefinition
    • The OperationDefinition above must be defined by a SelectionSet and the argument must exist in the first Selection. For example, the getTask would be the "first" selection that has the target argument
    • The target argument has "id" as argument key and value must be a string. For instance, the argument id: "0x3" of getTask field has the matching key and matching value type

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      @NotNull Optional<String> getArgumentValue()
      Returns the visit result of this visitor, i.e.
      static @NotNull graphql.language.NodeVisitor newInstance()
      Returns a new instance of fully initialized TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor.
      @NotNull graphql.util.TraversalControl visitArgument​(@NotNull graphql.language.Argument node, graphql.util.TraverserContext<graphql.language.Node> context)
      Visits an Argument and, if the argument key is "id", picks up the value of that argument as a string value and make it as the return value of getArgumentValue().
      graphql.util.TraversalControl visitDocument​(@NotNull graphql.language.Document node, graphql.util.TraverserContext<graphql.language.Node> context)
      Visits the first definition, which must be a OperationDefinition, in a specified Document.
      graphql.util.TraversalControl visitField​(@NotNull graphql.language.Field node, graphql.util.TraverserContext<graphql.language.Node> context)
      Visits all Arguments of a specified Field and picks up the value of the argument, whose key is "id", as the return value of getArgumentValue().
      graphql.util.TraversalControl visitOperationDefinition​(@NotNull graphql.language.OperationDefinition node, graphql.util.TraverserContext<graphql.language.Node> context)
      Visits the SelectionSet, which must exist, of a specified OperationDefinition.
      graphql.util.TraversalControl visitSelectionSet​(@NotNull graphql.language.SelectionSet node, graphql.util.TraverserContext<graphql.language.Node> context)
      Visits the first Selection, which must be a Field, within a specified SelectionSet.
      @NotNull graphql.util.TraversalControl visitStringValue​(@NotNull graphql.language.StringValue node, graphql.util.TraverserContext<graphql.language.Node> context)
      Visits a specified StringValue node and always assign the value to the target argument value, i.e.

        visitDocument in interface graphql.language.NodeVisitor
        Overrides:

        not intend to be used

                                                              graphql.util.TraverserContext<graphql.language.Node> context)
        Visits the SelectionSet, which must exist, of a specified OperationDefinition.
        Specified by:
        visitOperationDefinition in interface graphql.language.NodeVisitor
        Overrides:
        visitOperationDefinition in class graphql.language.NodeVisitorStub

        node - An OperationDefinition that is guaranteed to contain a non-null SelectionSet.
        context - A traversal context object used during visit

        not intend to be used

      • visitSelectionSet

        public graphql.util.TraversalControl visitSelectionSet​(@NotNull
                                                       @NotNull graphql.language.SelectionSet node,
                                                       graphql.util.TraverserContext<graphql.language.Node> context)
        Visits the first Selection, which must be a Field, within a specified SelectionSet.
        Specified by:
        visitSelectionSet in interface graphql.language.NodeVisitor
        Overrides:
        visitSelectionSet in class graphql.language.NodeVisitorStub
        Parameters:
        node - A SelectionSet with the first Selection being a Field, cannot be null
        context - A traversal context object used during visit
        Returns:
        not intend to be used

      • visitField

        public graphql.util.TraversalControl visitField​(@NotNull
                                                @NotNull graphql.language.Field node,
                                                graphql.util.TraverserContext<graphql.language.Node> context)
        Visits all Arguments of a specified Field and picks up the value of the argument, whose key is "id", as the return value of getArgumentValue().

        If no such argument exists, the getArgumentValue() would return Optional.empty()

        Specified by:
        visitField in interface graphql.language.NodeVisitor
        Overrides:
        visitField in class graphql.language.NodeVisitorStub
        Parameters:
        node - A Field instance
        context - A traversal context object used during visit
        Returns:
        not intend to be used

      • visitArgument

        @NotNull
public @NotNull graphql.util.TraversalControl visitArgument​(@NotNull
                                                            @NotNull graphql.language.Argument node,
                                                            graphql.util.TraverserContext<graphql.language.Node> context)
        Visits an Argument and, if the argument key is "id", picks up the value of that argument as a string value and make it as the return value of getArgumentValue().
        Specified by:
        visitArgument in interface graphql.language.NodeVisitor
        Overrides:
        visitArgument in class graphql.language.NodeVisitorStub
        Parameters:
        node - An Argument instance
        context - A traversal context object used during visit
        Returns:
        a signal to stop the whole visit if the argument key is "id" or a signal to continue, otherwise

      • visitStringValue

        @NotNull
public @NotNull graphql.util.TraversalControl visitStringValue​(@NotNull
                                                               @NotNull graphql.language.StringValue node,
                                                               graphql.util.TraverserContext<graphql.language.Node> context)
        Visits a specified StringValue node and always assign the value to the target argument value, i.e. the return value of getArgumentValue().
        Specified by:
        visitStringValue in interface graphql.language.NodeVisitor
        Overrides:
        visitStringValue in class graphql.language.NodeVisitorStub
        Parameters:
        node - A StringValue instance
        context - A traversal context object used during visit
        Returns:
        not intend to be used

      • getArgumentValue

        @NotNull
public @NotNull Optional<String> getArgumentValue()
        Returns the visit result of this visitor, i.e. the top selection field id argument value.
        Returns:
        the id argument value or empty if not exists
